case_title: PATEL, NAVNIT G. vs. ANTHONY, ORLANDO et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT ANTHONY, ORLANDO ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT ANTHONY, ORLANDO

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANTHONY, ORLANDO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 908 POST ST, RM#5, STAYED UNTIL JUL-05-1993, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEF FAILS TO SIGN STIP WITHIN 5 DAYS OF RECEVING, PL MAY EXECUTE ON STIP. JUDGMENT. SEE FILE FOR COMPLETE DETAILS.
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE D.R.V. IS $12.66 FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, NAVNIT G.
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT ANTHONY, ORLANDO
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, NAVNIT G. AS TO DEFENDANT ANTHONY, ORLANDO DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED

3:30 P.M. C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. CASE SETTLED BY PRO TEM JUDGE DEAN HEDANI RECORDED BY JOHN LEWIS. STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLTF. DEFT. TO MOVE BY 12:00 P.M ON 7/5/93. IF DEFENDANT VACATES TIMELY, PLAINTIFF TO WAIVE PAST DUE RENT, DAMAGES, ATTORNEY FEES AND COST. PLAINTIFF ORDERED NOT TO WITHHOLD DEFENDANT'S MAIL AND TO SERVE A WRITTEN COPY OF THIS STIPULATION ON THE DEFENDANT BY CERTIFIED MAIL.
